name: Savingio Article Layout V3
goal: Use one stable article canvas beside the global Brain Explorer and prevent narrow-column collapse from stale or conflicting layout rules.

rules.global_explorer: Only the fixed Problem-Solving Explorer remains on the left.
rules.article_canvas: The article body uses one flexible main column.
rules.context_rail: A 170px action rail is shown only when desktop width permits.
rules.responsive: The action rail is removed below 1180px and summary cards become one column below 860px.
